titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Steven Bergman Documentary Material for the Yale School of Management
Steven Bergman Documentary Material for the Yale School of Management
titlestmt.author: compiled by Michael Lotstein

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday January 10, 2025 at 06:27

did.unittitle: Steven Bergman Documentary Material for the Yale School of Management
did.abstract: Original camera master (Hi-8 videocassette) interviews and production files from an unfinished documentary entitled "Creating a New Order" filmed and produced by Steven Bergman, MPPM/MBA '92

odd.head: General
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 48-B (YRG 48-B), Yale audiovisual records and collections.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Steven Bergman Documentary Material for the Yale School of Management (RU 1152). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research. Original audiovisual materials, as well as preservation and duplicating masters, may not be played. Researchers must consult use copies, or if none exist must pay for a use copy, which is retained by the repository. Researchers wishing to obtain an additional copy for their personal use should consult Copying Services information on the Manuscripts and Archives web site.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright is retained by the creator(s) of this collection for materials they have authored or otherwise produced. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Original camera master (Hi-8 videocassette) interviews and production files from an unfinished documentary entitled "Creating a New Order" filmed and produced by Steven Bergman, MPPM/MBA '92

did.unittitle: Associate Dean Charles Bonini, Stanford GSB
Professor Eric Denardo, Camera B and Professor Clayton Alderfer, Camera B
Dean Mike Levine and J.P. Moscarella
Dean Levine, keynote at the Graduate School Professional Assembly
Dean Paul McAvoy and John Perry Miller

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Attacheed to John Perry Miller's transcript are two chapters of his unpublished autobiography: Chapter IX, The Institution for Social Policy Studies; Chapter XII, Management Education at Yale-Search for a Unique Mission.

did.unittitle: Social Change SIG with Professors Clayton Alderfer, Vic Vroom, and Paul Berney
School of Management "media blitz" panel: McAvoy, Bryen, Kelly, USN&WR
Production materials and School of Management files
"Creating a New Order": 15 Years of Management Education at Yale
School of Management brochures for new students
Mike Levine-departure from the Yale School of Management
School of Management in the news
